intro: Nujiangia griffithii, also known as Tibetan angelica, is a perennial plant species native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Nujiangia griffithii contains a range of bioactive constituents, including essential oils, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, such as nujiangine and sesquiterpenes, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
